name: Thread Race
description: Bypass the corporate sensor gate by forcing two data threads to write to the authorization register at the same instant — before the security daemon can lock it.

flaws.name: Spawn Writer Thread
flaws.flavor_text: Launch the first unsynchronized thread to hold the authorization register open.

flaws.name: Race the Second Thread
flaws.flavor_text: Fire the second thread while the first still holds the register. With no mutex, both writes land and the gate flips before the daemon can lock it.
